description_long: This is a black slip-on clog-style shoe with a closed toe and open heel, featuring a slightly elevated, chunky sole. The upper is smooth and appears to be made of synthetic or leather material, with a subtle seam and orange stitching detail near the instep. The sole is thick and solid, likely constructed from a dense rubber or similar material, and includes small metallic rivets on the side for reinforcement and style. The footbed is contoured for comfort, and the overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for urban environments. The shoe has no visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing ease of wear. The finish is matte with a slight sheen, and the shoe appears to be in pristine, unused condition.
description: A black, slip-on clog shoe with a chunky sole, orange stitching, and metallic rivet details, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a closed toe.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, orange stitching, and metallic rivets on the heel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the closed, rounded toe and the smooth upper surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same profile and rivet details as the first side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open heel and the back of the sole with a visible rivet.
